# Phase 2 Validation Log

**Date:** 2026-03-01
**Purpose:** End-to-end validation of automated release pipeline (REL-06)

## Validation Steps

- [x] feat: commit merged to main via PR
- [x] Git tag modules/docker/container/v1.0.0 created by automation
- [x] GitHub Release modules/docker/container/v1.0.0 created with auto-generated notes
- [x] GitHub Wiki updated with Docker container module page
- [x] PR title validation CI step active (confirmed by pr-title.yaml workflow run on PR #11)
- [x] PR title "feat: add consumer source URL and module description to docker container README" accepted by CI

## Results

- **Tag:** `modules/docker/container/v1.0.0` confirmed via `git tag -l`
- **Release URL:** <https://github.com/Schillman/terraform-registry/releases/tag/modules%2Fdocker%2Fcontainer%2Fv1.0.0>
- **Release Notes:** Auto-generated by terraform-module-releaser from PR #11 commit messages
- **Wiki:** Initialized manually (Home page), module page auto-written at `modules/docker/container.md`
- **PR Title CI:** Validate PR Title check active on all PRs targeting main (pr-title.yaml)

## Notes

The initial validation PR (#10) triggered the feat: commit but did not touch any module directory
(.github/ path only), so terraform-module-releaser correctly created no tag for that PR.
A second PR (#11) touching `modules/docker/container/README.md` triggered the v1.0.0 release.
Both the release.yaml and pr-title.yaml workflows were cherry-picked to main from the
phase-02 branch before PR #11 was opened.
